creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


There has been a lot of discussion recently about why the defaults 
are right for most users, please refer to the -net mailing list 
archives starting around 3 August. 

Also, the port has nothing to do with this, default directory 
permissions are enforced in /etc/rc.d/named, and the default 
named.conf file has appropriate examples for most things. 

If you need custom logging options you should take a good 
look in /var/named/, especially /var/named/var/log which 
does have appropriate permissions set.
